operation.name: write_at_psmgr_connect
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun enc_mode () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  false (bvult  (concat  (select  enc_mode (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_mode (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_mode (_ bv1 32) ) (select  enc_mode (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (_ bv16 32) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun enc_mode () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun window_sz () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  window_sz (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  window_sz (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  window_sz (_ bv1 32) ) (select  window_sz (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (and  (bvult  (concat  (select  enc_mode (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_mode (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  enc_mode (_ bv1 32) ) (select  enc_mode (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (_ bv16 32) ) (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) ) (bvule  ?B1 (_ bv65535 32) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_session.validated stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets validated without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
